description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally upward. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless top with a fitted cut and a pair of straight-leg pants. The figure's shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking. The person has medium-length hair styled in a low ponytail, with facial features that are neutral and forward-facing. The arms are unusually elongated and stylized, creating a striking visual effect. No accessories or carried objects are visible on the figure.
description: An adult pedestrian standing upright with arms raised diagonally, wearing a sleeveless top, pants, and flat shoes, with medium-length hair in a ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised and extended upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's unusual extension, and the straight-leg pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ponytail, and the back of the sleeveless top and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the extended arm, and the side of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-leg pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised diagonally
